code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useStripe,useElements,CardElement}from'@stripe/react-stripe-js';import'./payment.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:3000";const CheckoutForm=_ref=>{let{bookingId,amount,onPaymentSuccess}=_ref;const stripe=useStripe();const elements=useElements();const[error,setError]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const handleSubmit=async event=>{event.preventDefault();if(!stripe||!elements){return;}const cardElement=elements.getElement(CardElement);setLoading(true);const{error,paymentMethod}=await stripe.createPaymentMethod({type:'card',card:cardElement});if(error){setError(error.message);setLoading(false);return;}try{const response=await fetch(`${API_URL}/payments`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({stripeToken:paymentMethod.id,booking_id:bookingId,amount:amount})});const paymentResult=await response.json();if(!response.ok){setError(paymentResult.error||'Payment failed');}else{onPaymentSuccess(paymentResult);}}catch(err){setError('An error occurred during the payment process.');}finally{setLoading(false);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"payment-form",onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Complete Your Payment"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CardElement,{className:"StripeElement"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",disabled:!stripe||loading,children:loading?'Processing...':'Pay Now'}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"error-message",children:error})]});};export default CheckoutForm;
